summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mock Testing Suite v3.0 Settings rebuild and new features - backend APIs working, most frontend features functional with 2 integration issues identified

integration_issues.issue: Only 3 Discord templates displayed instead of expected 15 - settings API returns 3 but defaults API has 15
integration_issues.details: Backend defaults API correctly returns 15 templates, but current settings only contain 3 custom templates. Need to check if Reset Defaults functionality works for Discord templates.

integration_issues.issue: Conditional visibility not working - Sheets link remains visible even when Google Sheets is disabled in settings
integration_issues.details: Sidebar should hide Sheets link when enable_sheets setting is false, but link remains visible after toggling setting and saving.

passed_tests: Backend API: All 7 endpoints working (settings, defaults, history/stats, session/start, session/call, gemini/summaries, finish-session)
Backend API: /api/settings/defaults returns correct data - 5 call types, 6 shows, 4 new donors, 3 existing members, 2 increase sustaining, 15 discord templates
Settings Page: All 10 tabs present and functional (General, Shows, Call Types, Callers, Sup Reasons, Discord, Payment, Gemini AI, Google Sheets, Calendar)
Settings General Tab: Ticker Doc URL and Auto-Updater Doc URL placeholders working
Settings Shows Tab: 6 shows loaded with editable name/one-time/monthly/gift fields, + Add Show and Reset Defaults buttons present
Settings Call Types Tab: 5 call types loaded with editable inputs, 'Use Own/Custom' always shown, + Add Call Type button present
Settings Callers Tab: 3 sub-tabs working (New Donors (4), Existing Members (3), Increase Sustaining (2)) with editable tables and state dropdowns
Settings Sup Reasons Tab: 7 reasons loaded with editable inputs, 'Use Own/Other' always shown, + Add Reason button present
Settings Discord Tab: Templates loaded with editable trigger/message pairs, + Add Template button present
Settings Save Button: Works correctly and shows confirmation dialog
Basics Page: Auto-fail buttons (NC/NS, Not Ready, Stopped Responding) have proper title tooltips
Navigation: All pages accessible via sidebar (Home, Basics, Calls, Sup Transfer, Review, History, Settings, Help)
Frontend: App loads correctly and all major UI components functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Discord templates display issue (only 3 showing instead of 15) and implement proper conditional visibility for sidebar Sheets link when Google Sheets is disabled
